heading: Art. 120a. Mails: deposit of obscene matter
label: 920a Art. 120a. Mails: deposit of obscene matter
text: Any person subject to this chapter who, wrongfully and knowingly, deposits obscene matter for mailing and delivery shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 920a was renumbered .section 930 of this title

Effective DateSection effective on , as designated by the President, with implementing regulations and provisions relating to applicability to various situations, see and Ex. Ord. No. 13825, set out as notes under .Jan. 1, 2019section 5542 of Pub. L. 114–328section 801 of this title
